summary: Comprehensive testing of onboarding flow (shop owner & travel agent applications), admin application management, smart login redirects, and password change features completed. Backend API testing achieved 100% success rate (23/23 tests passed). Frontend testing confirmed all flows working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement needed

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed applications during pytest runs for application management testing. Created test user pwtest_ui@example.com for password change flow testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All onboarding features working correctly: (1) Landing page CTA buttons for shop owners and travel agents navigate to /apply with correct type parameter, (2) Application forms collect all required fields, (3) Admin Applications tab shows applications with Type badges and approve/reject actions, (4) Approval creates user with generated password shown in UI, (5) Password change dialog appears on first login for must_change_password users, (6) Smart redirects work: admin→/admin, shop_owner→/shop, travel_agent→/travel-agent, customer→/dashboard. Resend email integration is REAL but limited to verified emails in test mode.
mocked_integrations: SMS/Email notifications - PARTIALLY MOCKED (Resend email is REAL but test mode limited)
